text:
SuperGroupies is a Japanese fashion brand that collaborates with popular anime and game franchises. For each collaboration, they create specially designed products.

Information

The first collaboration merchandise was released in December 2019. The second collaboration was in 2021 and brought back products from the first collaboration.

Collaboration Characters

Gon Freecss
Killua Zoldyck
Kurapika
Leorio Paradinight (First collaboration only)
Hisoka Morow
Chrollo Lucilfer
